title: The 30 Foot Bride of Candy Rock
writer: Rowland Barber, Arthur A. Ross, Lawrence L. Goldman
actors: Lou Costello, Dorothy Provine, Gale Gordon
plot: In one of his rare performances without Bud Abbott, Lou Costello plays a rubbish collector and inventor. When radiation in a nearby cave turns his girlfriend into a giantess, antics ensue as he tries to shrink her using one of his...
